ques: Search for a 'virtual reality' related repository on GitHub updated in the last 10 days with at least 200 stars and summarize its main objective.
answer: The top match is aframevr/aframe (17.6k stars, updated 2 days ago). A-Frame is an open-source web framework for building browser-based 3D, AR, and VR experiences. Its main objective is to make VR development simple by handling the 3D/WebXR boilerplate so developers can build cross-platform experiences (mobile, desktop, and all WebXR headsets) using a declarative, entity-component HTML structure built on top of three.js.
